```{=html}
//unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css"/>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>

<div style="max-width:960px; margin:0 auto; padding:40px 20px; text-align:center; font-family:'Georgia',serif;">
  <p style="font-size:1.1rem; letter-spacing:0.25em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#9b8877; margin-bottom:6px;">My Travels</p>
  <h2 style="font-size:2rem; font-style:italic; color:#3a3a3a; margin-bottom:30px;">Places I've Been</h2>

  <div id="travel-map" style="width:100%; height:480px; border-radius:8px; box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);"></div>

  <div style="display:flex; justify-content:center; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:22px;" id="chip-container">
    <div class="tmap-chip tmap-active" data-region="europe" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:#c9aa96;border:1.5px solid #c9aa96;border-radius:20px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:0.82rem;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;">
      <span style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:currentColor;display:inline-block;"></span> Europe
    </div>
    <div class="tmap-chip tmap-active" data-region="east-asia" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:#c9aa96;border:1.5px solid #c9aa96;border-radius:20px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:0.82rem;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;">
      <span style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:currentColor;display:inline-block;"></span> East Asia
    </div>
    <div class="tmap-chip tmap-active" data-region="southeast-asia" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:#c9aa96;border:1.5px solid #c9aa96;border-radius:20px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:0.82rem;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;">
      <span style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:currentColor;display:inline-block;"></span> Southeast Asia
    </div>
    <div class="tmap-chip tmap-active" data-region="australia" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:#c9aa96;border:1.5px solid #c9aa96;border-radius:20px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:0.82rem;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;">
      <span style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:currentColor;display:inline-block;"></span> Australia
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
  .leaflet-popup-content-wrapper {
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-family: 'Georgia', serif;
  }
  .tmap-chip { transition: all 0.2s ease; }
  .tmap-chip:hover { opacity: 0.85; }
</style>

<script>
(function() {
  var tmap = L.map('travel-map', {
    center: , zoom: 2, minZoom: 2, maxZoom: 6,
    scrollWheelZoom: true, zoomControl: true
  });

  L.tileLayer('https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_nolabels/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png', {
    attribution: '&copy; <a href="https://carto.com/">CARTO</a>',
    subdomains: 'abcd', maxZoom: 19
  }).addTo(tmap);

  L.tileLayer('https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_only_labels/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png', {
    subdomains: 'abcd', maxZoom: 19, opacity: 0.6
  }).addTo(tmap);

  var regions = [
    { id: 'europe',        bounds: [[-12,-25],],   center: ,   label: 'Europe',       note: 'Ireland, Germany & more' },
    { id: 'east-asia',     bounds: [,],   center: ,  label: 'East Asia',    note: 'Japan & more' },
    { id: 'southeast-asia',bounds: [[-10,95],],   center: ,  label: 'Southeast Asia', note: 'Thailand, Vietnam & more' },
    { id: 'australia',     bounds: [[-44,113],[-10,154]], center: [-27,133], label: 'Australia',    note: 'Australia' }
  ];

  var layerMap = {};

  regions.forEach(function(r, i) {
    var rect = L.rectangle(r.bounds, {
      color: '#c9aa96', weight: 1.5, fillColor: '#c9aa96', fillOpacity: 0.18
    }).addTo(tmap);

    var icon = L.divIcon({
      className: '',
      html: '<div style="width:36px;height:36px;background:#c9aa96;border:2.5px solid #fff;border-radius:50%;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-family:Georgia,serif;font-style:italic;font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;">' + (i+1) + '</div>',
      iconSize: , iconAnchor: , popupAnchor: [0,-20]
    });

    var marker = L.marker(r.center, { icon: icon }).addTo(tmap)
      .bindPopup(
        '<div style="text-align:center;min-width:140px;font-family:Georgia,serif;">' +
        '<div style="font-size:0.7rem;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#c9aa96;margin-bottom:4px;">' + r.label + '</div>' +
        '<div style="font-size:1rem;font-style:italic;color:#3a3a3a;">' + r.note + '</div>' +
        '</div>', { maxWidth: 180 }
      );

    rect.on('mouseover', function() { this.setStyle({ fillOpacity: 0.35 }); });
    rect.on('mouseout',  function() { this.setStyle({ fillOpacity: 0.18 }); });
    rect.on('click', function() { marker.openPopup(); });

    layerMap[r.id] = { rect: rect, marker: marker };
  });

  document.querySelectorAll('.tmap-chip').forEach(function(chip) {
    chip.addEventListener('click', function() {
      var id = this.getAttribute('data-region');
      var layers = layerMap[id];
      var isActive = this.classList.contains('tmap-active');
      if (isActive) {
        this.classList.remove('tmap-active');
        this.style.background = '#fff';
        this.style.borderColor = '#e0d5cc';
        this.style.color = '#6b5c50';
        tmap.removeLayer(layers.rect);
        tmap.removeLayer(layers.marker);
      } else {
        this.classList.add('tmap-active');
        this.style.background = '#c9aa96';
        this.style.borderColor = '#c9aa96';
        this.style.color = '#fff';
        layers.rect.addTo(tmap);
        layers.marker.addTo(tmap);
      }
    });
  });
})();
</script>
```
